title: Nursing Students' Knowledge, Attitudes, and Skills Related to Perinatal Substance Use.
summary: Substance use in the perinatal period is a critical public health issue in the United States. Nurses play a significant role in promoting positive maternal-infant health outcomes for women who use substances in the perinatal period. title: Generative AI Podcasts for Learning: Perceptions of Faculty and Graduate Nursing Students.
summary: In nursing education, faculty generated and commercially prepared podcasts have been shown to be an effective way to deliver content. Generative artificial intelligence (GAI) technology can be used to create human-like podcast audio recordings using evidence-based resources chosen by faculty....

title: Redesigning Nursing Curricula for Human-AI Collaboration Using a Fifth Industrial Revolution Framework: Discursive Paper.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly embedded in healthcare, reshaping clinical decision-making, care delivery, and professional nursing roles. title: What Are the Opportunities and Challenges of Using AI in Medical Education in Vietnam?
